blocks.text: Rain softened Bay Hill and Berger seized it, leading at -13 as the course lost its teeth. Hovland sits T13 at -5 — a quiet tournament so far, needing a Sunday charge to matter.
🚴 Mon 12:40 — Tirreno-Adriatico kicks off: Leknessund and Wærenskjold headline Norway's challenge
Tuesday and Wednesday deliver four ★5 Champions League first legs. The crown jewel: Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP at Aspmyra on Wednesday — the biggest knockout tie in Norwegian club football history.
